PublicRemarks: Check out to this beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhome located in the highly desirable Charlestown Oaks community in Malvern in Great Valley School District. The home also features an attached one-car garage, a finished walk-out basement, central air and forced-air heating, in-unit laundry, and access to community amenities including tennis courts and a playground. Located just minutes from major highways, shopping, and dining, and within the award-winning Great Valley School District, this home offers the perfect combination of convenience and quality living. Pictures are taken before the current tenant moved in. Upstairs bedrooms are painted neutral colors since then. Please Note: Property can't be shown until April 20th.Thanks for understanding.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to this beautifully designed new-construction 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath townhome located in the highly regarded Oxford Area School District, offering modern comfort, convenience, and low-maintenance living. Perfectly positioned just off US-1 at PA-10, this home provides easy access to major commuting routes while keeping everyday amenities close at hand. The first floor features a desirable layout with open feel. Enjoy an expansive eat-in kitchen outfitted with a built-in microwave, stove/oven, and dishwasher—perfect for cooking, entertaining, and daily convenience. A spacious great room, main-floor laundry hookups, and a half bath complete this level, offering an effortless flow and modern functionality. On the second floor, you’ll find the primary bedroom with ensuite bath featuring a walk-in shower. two generously sized bedrooms and a well-appointed full bath. A full unfinished basement provides exceptional storage. Parking is a breeze with a 1-car garage, 1-car driveway, and one additional designated space in the common parking area. Located minutes from charming downtown Oxford, you’ll enjoy local shops, restaurants, cafés, parks, and community events. Quick access to US-1 puts Kennett Square, Newark, Lincoln University, and Chester County destinations within easy reach. Everyday conveniences such as grocery stores, healthcare, and recreational amenities are all nearby, along with access to outdoor attractions like Nottingham County Park, hiking trails, and local farms. This brand-new home combines modern design, excellent location, and thoughtful features—ready for you to make it your own! HOA fee includes mowing/lawn/landscaping maintenance and trash removal. Pets must be spayed/neutered. 1 pet per unit. Pet must be approved by Landlord prior to lease signing. Building is cable wired. There is a $250 cleaning fee upon move-out. (Photos are of a similar unit)

Fantastic natural and only 1 attached neighbor.  1 Car attached garage 1 car driveway parking with overflow parking in the community. Entry, coat closet. updated powder room, inside access to garage. Finished basement laundry and bonus room with its own door so 4th bedroom, office, workout room, playroom whatever one chooses. O/e to paver patio under the deck for additional seclusion. Newer engineer flooring and painting t/o most of the home. No carpets to worry about. This home fools you from the exterior. Quite spacious and useful floorplan. Also, with the deck and paver patio lots of relaxation to enjoy in a secluded setting. Very walkable community even into "Sadsbury Park". Chester Cty airport less that 1/2 a mile, easy access to shopping and all major roads. Please only inquire if your total gross monthly income is at least 2.5-3 times the asking rent, credit scores of at least 650 and 2-3 months rent up front at signing.

Open Kitchen with a large island, elegant and upscale QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS, marble like design tiled backsplash, recessed lights, stainless steel appliances including a BRAND NEW OVEN- GAS COOKING RANGE and tiled floor. Two upgraded full bathrooms and two bedrooms with upgraded blinds complete this spacious condo that has laundry included inside the unit. PublicRemarks: This move-in ready townhouse features a finished, walk-out basement, offering 3 bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. The inviting foyer opens to a bright dining room and great room, which overlook a well-appointed kitchen with a large center island, breakfast bar, ample counter and cabinet space, and a spacious pantry.  The primary bedroom suite boasts a large walk-in closet and a spa-like bathroom with a dual-sink vanity, a luxurious glass-enclosed shower with a seat, and linen storage. Two secondary bedrooms, each with ample closet space, share a full hall bath with a dual-sink vanity.  Additional features include a generous flex space off the foyer, a convenient first-floor powder room, a finished basement, and plenty of extra storage throughout.  This home is located in the highly acclaimed Downingtown East School District with access to the STEM Academy. The location offers easy access to the PA Turnpike, Routes 100, 401, and 113, making for a convenient commute. Just a 5-minute drive to Marsh Creek Lake, Park, and trails where you can enjoy walking, biking, boating, and more.  Rent includes the HOA fee. Available from June 15th.

PublicRemarks: A rare rental opportunity in Beaver Run Knoll in Downingtown, set in a private court with no through traffic and unbeatable convenience. This well located 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath townhouse offers a comfortable, functional layout with added privacy, along with quick and easy access to Route 30, 322, the PA Turnpike, the Downingtown train station, shopping, dining, Wegmans, and nearby parks and trails.  Beaver Run Knoll is a well-established, walkable community with great amenities including a clubhouse, pool, dog park, basketball and tennis courts, pickleball courts, and multiple playgrounds. The HOA  organizes events throughout the year such as wine and cheese gatherings, Easter egg hunts, breakfast with Santa, summer pool parties, and holiday decorating contests, along with weekly lawn care during the summer. Enjoy all these perks with paid hoa dues by landlord!  The home features a functional layout with a welcoming front porch, spacious living room, well-equipped kitchen with all appliances included, including a newer refrigerator and dishwasher. The laundry is conveniently located just off the kitchen. The Sun-filled dining area opens to a flat backyard with a deck and shed, offering practical outdoor space and additional storage. Hardwood steps lead to the upper level with three bedrooms and storage closets. The primary bedroom includes a walk-in closet and an attached bathroom, while the hall bathroom features a skylight that brings in natural light and adds a bright feel. The home offers good storage throughout along with an outdoor shed. Two dedicated parking spaces with ample visitor parking and wide streets make day-to-day living easy in this neighborhood. Pets are considered on a case-by-case basis. good credit, clean background, and income of 3 times rent required. Available June 1. Homes in this location do not last long so schedule your appointment today!

PublicRemarks: Tucked into the storybook charm of Kimberton, this inviting 1-bedroom, 1-bath apartment offers more than just a place to live- it offers a lifestyle rooted in warmth, community, and simple pleasures.  Step outside your door and find yourself within a short, leisurely walk to Kimberton Whole Foods, where shelves are filled with thoughtfully sourced organic foods from local, sustainable farms.  Evenings can be spent indulging in an unforgettable dining experience at the historic Kimberton Inn, a beloved landmark known for its timeless elegance and exceptional cuisine.  Just down the block, you'll discover a delightful local florist offering fresh blooms to brighten your home or elevate your next gathering. PublicRemarks: The Diamond at Phoenixville offers a modern living experience in one of the most vibrant and walkable towns in the region. This boutique apartment community is designed for residents who appreciate both style and convenience, with thoughtfully crafted interiors and a location that places you just steps from the heart of downtown Phoenixville. From its refined finishes to its lifestyle-focused amenities, The Diamond creates an elevated rental experience that feels both luxurious and welcoming. Each apartment at The Diamond has been designed with a contemporary touch, featuring open-concept floor plans, oversized windows that let in an abundance of natural light, and high-end finishes throughout. Residents will enjoy chef-inspired kitchens with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and sleek cabinetry. Spacious bathrooms are outfitted with modern tile, walk-in showers or soaking tubs, and large vanities with ample storage. In-unit washers and dryers, premium plank flooring, and generous closet space ensure every unit is as practical as it is beautiful. Select apartments include private balconies, perfect for morning coffee or an evening glass of wine. Community amenities at The Diamond are tailored to enhance your lifestyle. A state-of-the-art fitness center makes it easy to stay active, while the resident lounge provides a stylish space to relax or work remotely. The pet-friendly atmosphere and thoughtfully landscaped surroundings make it easy to enjoy time outdoors with your furry companions. On-site parking and secure access add to the convenience of daily life, while professional management and maintenance teams ensure that your home is always well cared for. Located just a short walk from Phoenixville’s thriving downtown, The Diamond places you in the middle of one of the most exciting small-town destinations in Pennsylvania. Future residents will love being just minutes from Bridge Street, where a vibrant mix of locally owned restaurants, breweries, cafes, and shops offers endless options for dining and entertainment. Whether you're spending the afternoon at one of the nearby parks, catching a film at the historic Colonial Theatre, or browsing the farmer’s market on a weekend morning, life at The Diamond makes it easy to immerse yourself in the local culture. With its combination of upscale living, walkable location, and access to the best of Phoenixville, The Diamond offers an exceptional home for those who want to experience the charm of a small town with all the perks of modern apartment living. ** Photos are of model units ** Pricing subject to change on a daily basis ** Furnished - Available on Request **

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Phoenix Village Apartments – Your Gateway to Exceptional Living in Phoenixville! Imagine coming home to Phoenix Village, an upscale apartment community in the heart of Phoenixville, PA, where historic charm and modern elegance meet in perfect harmony. Designed for those who crave both style and convenience, Phoenix Village offers a premier living experience with thoughtfully designed amenities and spacious, luxurious apartments. Future residents will fall in love with our elegant one-, two-, and three-bedroom floor plans, crafted with an eye for detail and high-end finishes. Each apartment boasts contemporary features, such as gourmet kitchens with stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, large kitchen islands, and sleek cabinetry. Enjoy bright, open layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows that flood your home with natural light, as well as in-unit laundry, spacious closets, and private balconies that provide the perfect place to unwind and take in scenic views of the charming Phoenixville landscape. Phoenix Village is more than just a home; it’s a lifestyle. Step outside your door and find yourself surrounded by an abundance of community amenities. Enjoy a refreshing swim in our resort-style pool, get energized in our state-of-the-art fitness center, or simply relax with friends on our rooftop terrace, which offers breathtaking views of downtown Phoenixville and the nearby rolling hills of Chester County. Cozy resident lounges and co-working spaces are designed for social gatherings and productive days alike, making Phoenix Village the perfect place to balance work and relaxation. Located in vibrant Phoenixville, this community provides you with easy access to the best the neighborhood has to offer. You’ll be steps away from the bustling downtown scene, where you can explore eclectic dining options, from quaint cafes and bakeries to renowned restaurants. Discover a variety of local shops, art galleries, and theaters, along with the famous Schuylkill River Trail—a perfect spot for biking, jogging, or taking in the beautiful Pennsylvania scenery. Commuting is a breeze, with close proximity to major highways and public transit options, allowing you to reach Philadelphia and surrounding areas with ease. Phoenix Village’s location brings a small-town feel with big-city access, offering an unbeatable lifestyle that combines convenience, culture, and community spirit. Come home to Phoenix Village Apartments and experience an extraordinary blend of luxury, comfort, and vibrant neighborhood living. Book your tour today to see why residents adore calling Phoenix Village their home. Live, relax, and thrive—this is the lifestyle you’ve been waiting for! ** Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units **

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Phoenix Village Apartments – Your Gateway to Exceptional Living in Phoenixville! Imagine coming home to Phoenix Village, an upscale apartment community in the heart of Phoenixville, PA, where historic charm and modern elegance meet in perfect harmony. Designed for those who crave both style and convenience, Phoenix Village offers a premier living experience with thoughtfully designed amenities and spacious, luxurious apartments. Future residents will fall in love with our elegant one-, two-, and three-bedroom floor plans, crafted with an eye for detail and high-end finishes. Each apartment boasts contemporary features, such as gourmet kitchens with stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, large kitchen islands, and sleek cabinetry. Enjoy bright, open layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows that flood your home with natural light, as well as in-unit laundry, spacious closets, and private balconies that provide the perfect place to unwind and take in scenic views of the charming Phoenixville landscape. Phoenix Village is more than just a home; it’s a lifestyle. Step outside your door and find yourself surrounded by an abundance of community amenities. Enjoy a refreshing swim in our resort-style pool, get energized in our state-of-the-art fitness center, or simply relax with friends on our rooftop terrace, which offers breathtaking views of downtown Phoenixville and the nearby rolling hills of Chester County. Cozy resident lounges and co-working spaces are designed for social gatherings and productive days alike, making Phoenix Village the perfect place to balance work and relaxation. Located in vibrant Phoenixville, this community provides you with easy access to the best the neighborhood has to offer. You’ll be steps away from the bustling downtown scene, where you can explore eclectic dining options, from quaint cafes and bakeries to renowned restaurants. Discover a variety of local shops, art galleries, and theaters, along with the famous Schuylkill River Trail—a perfect spot for biking, jogging, or taking in the beautiful Pennsylvania scenery. Commuting is a breeze, with close proximity to major highways and public transit options, allowing you to reach Philadelphia and surrounding areas with ease. Phoenix Village’s location brings a small-town feel with big-city access, offering an unbeatable lifestyle that combines convenience, culture, and community spirit. Come home to Phoenix Village Apartments and experience an extraordinary blend of luxury, comfort, and vibrant neighborhood living. Book your tour today to see why residents adore calling Phoenix Village their home. Live, relax, and thrive—this is the lifestyle you’ve been waiting for! ** Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units **

PublicRemarks: The Diamond at Phoenixville offers a modern living experience in one of the most vibrant and walkable towns in the region. This boutique apartment community is designed for residents who appreciate both style and convenience, with thoughtfully crafted interiors and a location that places you just steps from the heart of downtown Phoenixville. From its refined finishes to its lifestyle-focused amenities, The Diamond creates an elevated rental experience that feels both luxurious and welcoming. Each apartment at The Diamond has been designed with a contemporary touch, featuring open-concept floor plans, oversized windows that let in an abundance of natural light, and high-end finishes throughout. Residents will enjoy chef-inspired kitchens with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and sleek cabinetry. Spacious bathrooms are outfitted with modern tile, walk-in showers or soaking tubs, and large vanities with ample storage. In-unit washers and dryers, premium plank flooring, and generous closet space ensure every unit is as practical as it is beautiful. Select apartments include private balconies, perfect for morning coffee or an evening glass of wine. Community amenities at The Diamond are tailored to enhance your lifestyle. A state-of-the-art fitness center makes it easy to stay active, while the resident lounge provides a stylish space to relax or work remotely. The pet-friendly atmosphere and thoughtfully landscaped surroundings make it easy to enjoy time outdoors with your furry companions. On-site parking and secure access add to the convenience of daily life, while professional management and maintenance teams ensure that your home is always well cared for. Located just a short walk from Phoenixville’s thriving downtown, The Diamond places you in the middle of one of the most exciting small-town destinations in Pennsylvania. Future residents will love being just minutes from Bridge Street, where a vibrant mix of locally owned restaurants, breweries, cafes, and shops offers endless options for dining and entertainment. Whether you're spending the afternoon at one of the nearby parks, catching a film at the historic Colonial Theatre, or browsing the farmer’s market on a weekend morning, life at The Diamond makes it easy to immerse yourself in the local culture. With its combination of upscale living, walkable location, and access to the best of Phoenixville, The Diamond offers an exceptional home for those who want to experience the charm of a small town with all the perks of modern apartment living. ** Photos are of model units ** Pricing subject to change on a daily basis ** Furnished - Available on Request **

Located just minutes from the Strafford SEPTA Regional Rail station, vibrant shopping and dining destinations along Lancaster Avenue, and major commuter routes, this property combines classic charm with unparalleled convenience and growth potential.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to Phoenix Village Apartments – Your Gateway to Exceptional Living in Phoenixville! Imagine coming home to Phoenix Village, an upscale apartment community in the heart of Phoenixville, PA, where historic charm and modern elegance meet in perfect harmony. Designed for those who crave both style and convenience, Phoenix Village offers a premier living experience with thoughtfully designed amenities and spacious, luxurious apartments. Future residents will fall in love with our elegant one-, two-, and three-bedroom floor plans, crafted with an eye for detail and high-end finishes. Each apartment boasts contemporary features, such as gourmet kitchens with stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, large kitchen islands, and sleek cabinetry. Enjoy bright, open layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows that flood your home with natural light, as well as in-unit laundry, spacious closets, and private balconies that provide the perfect place to unwind and take in scenic views of the charming Phoenixville landscape. Phoenix Village is more than just a home; it’s a lifestyle. Step outside your door and find yourself surrounded by an abundance of community amenities. Enjoy a refreshing swim in our resort-style pool, get energized in our state-of-the-art fitness center, or simply relax with friends on our rooftop terrace, which offers breathtaking views of downtown Phoenixville and the nearby rolling hills of Chester County. Cozy resident lounges and co-working spaces are designed for social gatherings and productive days alike, making Phoenix Village the perfect place to balance work and relaxation. Located in vibrant Phoenixville, this community provides you with easy access to the best the neighborhood has to offer. You’ll be steps away from the bustling downtown scene, where you can explore eclectic dining options, from quaint cafes and bakeries to renowned restaurants. Discover a variety of local shops, art galleries, and theaters, along with the famous Schuylkill River Trail—a perfect spot for biking, jogging, or taking in the beautiful Pennsylvania scenery. Commuting is a breeze, with close proximity to major highways and public transit options, allowing you to reach Philadelphia and surrounding areas with ease. Phoenix Village’s location brings a small-town feel with big-city access, offering an unbeatable lifestyle that combines convenience, culture, and community spirit. Come home to Phoenix Village Apartments and experience an extraordinary blend of luxury, comfort, and vibrant neighborhood living. Book your tour today to see why residents adore calling Phoenix Village their home. Live, relax, and thrive—this is the lifestyle you’ve been waiting for! ** Pricing and availability subject to change on a daily basis ** Photos are of model units **

PublicRemarks: The Diamond at Phoenixville offers a modern living experience in one of the most vibrant and walkable towns in the region. This boutique apartment community is designed for residents who appreciate both style and convenience, with thoughtfully crafted interiors and a location that places you just steps from the heart of downtown Phoenixville. From its refined finishes to its lifestyle-focused amenities, The Diamond creates an elevated rental experience that feels both luxurious and welcoming. Each apartment at The Diamond has been designed with a contemporary touch, featuring open-concept floor plans, oversized windows that let in an abundance of natural light, and high-end finishes throughout. Residents will enjoy chef-inspired kitchens with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and sleek cabinetry. Spacious bathrooms are outfitted with modern tile, walk-in showers or soaking tubs, and large vanities with ample storage. In-unit washers and dryers, premium plank flooring, and generous closet space ensure every unit is as practical as it is beautiful. Select apartments include private balconies, perfect for morning coffee or an evening glass of wine. Community amenities at The Diamond are tailored to enhance your lifestyle. A state-of-the-art fitness center makes it easy to stay active, while the resident lounge provides a stylish space to relax or work remotely. The pet-friendly atmosphere and thoughtfully landscaped surroundings make it easy to enjoy time outdoors with your furry companions. On-site parking and secure access add to the convenience of daily life, while professional management and maintenance teams ensure that your home is always well cared for. Located just a short walk from Phoenixville’s thriving downtown, The Diamond places you in the middle of one of the most exciting small-town destinations in Pennsylvania. Future residents will love being just minutes from Bridge Street, where a vibrant mix of locally owned restaurants, breweries, cafes, and shops offers endless options for dining and entertainment. Whether you're spending the afternoon at one of the nearby parks, catching a film at the historic Colonial Theatre, or browsing the farmer’s market on a weekend morning, life at The Diamond makes it easy to immerse yourself in the local culture. With its combination of upscale living, walkable location, and access to the best of Phoenixville, The Diamond offers an exceptional home for those who want to experience the charm of a small town with all the perks of modern apartment living. ** Photos are of model units ** Pricing subject to change on a daily basis ** Furnished - Available on Request **

This stunning, creampuff 3 bedroom, 2.5 bath end-unit townhome is open, bright and exquisitely updated for just the style of living you've imagined. Gorgeous patios and garden areas have been expanded for outdoor entertaining and gracious living. A welcoming foyer with 10-ft ceilings greets your guests upon entering. An open living area with gleaming hardwood floors, recessed lighting and multiple double glass sliding doors allow garden views and access throughout. The main living space opens to the dining area which has custom built-ins and additional access to the private patio. Perfect for entertaining! The gourmet kitchen is equipped with high-end appliances, subzero refrigerator, an abundance of wood cabinetry, granite counters, designer backsplash, a breakfast nook and access to an enclosed patio for convenient grilling. The second floor has a spectacular master suite with large bedroom and sitting area, built-in cabinetry, walk-in closet, sitting balcony, and a relaxing master bath with soaking tub, tiled shower, built-ins, and a large double sink vanity with granite counters. You'll be able to soak away your cares and rejuvenate daily in your spa-like bath. Two other bedrooms, one with balcony and a beautifully updated hall bath complete the second floor. The lower level offers many possibilities. It's your daily entrance from your two reserved parking spaces in the underground garage. You enter the home through a mudroom with custom built-in cubbies. The lower level also has two large rooms; perfect for use as a family room, exercise space, or home offices. The laundry is also on this level. The Arbordeau community offers a swimming pool, club house, rental guest rooms and a staffed, gated entrance. Are you ready for the Arbordeau lifestyle? 4 Brettagne is ready to tell it's next story. Will you be in it?

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 296 N Caldwell Circle, a beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath rental townhome located in the highly sought-after Applecross Country Club community within the award-winning Downingtown Area School District. Ideally situated within the neighborhood, this home is just steps from the pools, fitness center, and scenic walking trails, offering a true resort-style living experience. A grand foyer entry opens to a spacious and inviting great room featuring a cozy gas fireplace, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The adjacent family room flows seamlessly into the dining area, where sliding glass doors lead to a private deck overlooking open space—an ideal setting for relaxing or hosting guests. The tastefully appointed eat-in kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances, upgraded cabinetry, and ample counter space, offering both functionality and a natural flow for entertaining. The second floor features a spacious primary suite complete with a tray ceiling, a large en-suite bath, and an expansive walk-in closet. Two additional bedrooms, a full hall bath, and a convenient upper-level laundry area complete this level. The home also offers a large basement with an electric fireplace and additional storage space, providing flexibility for a variety of uses. Residents of Applecross Country Club enjoy access to exceptional amenities, including a Nicklaus-designed 18-hole golf course, indoor and outdoor pools, a Caribbean-style pool bar, tennis and basketball courts, and a state-of-the-art fitness center with Studio T. The community also offers a full-service restaurant and bar, fitness classes, and a full calendar of social events. Conveniently located near Route 322, Route 30, Route 100, the Pennsylvania Turnpike, and the Downingtown and Thorndale train stations, this home provides easy access to parks, shopping, and dining. A rare opportunity to lease in one of Chester County’s premier communities.

Here is a unique opportunity to lease a 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom home in the Aspenwood community in the highly sought after Downingtown Area School District which offers the STEM Academy.  This open layout home is extremely clean and offers many updates.  The home has many new appliances and offers updated lighting with recessed lighting throughout.  There is a private patio outback for grilling, entertaining or relaxing. There is a decorative fireplace in the living room/ den as well.   Upstairs the main bedroom offers a large walk-in closet and a freshly updated full bath.  There is another full bathroom, 2 more decent sized bedrooms and a washer and dryer upstairs as well.  Out front is quiet sitting area and additional storage with the built in & lockable shed.  Tenants are required to cover 75% of the hardwood floors with area rugs; the fireplace is for decorative purposes only and cannot be used.  The grill can be used in as is condition or can be removed from the property.  Aspenwood residents enjoy access to a community pool, playgrounds and clubhouse as well as lawn care, snow removal and common area maintenance.  The Aspenwood community is also conveniently located to shopping, nightlife, parks, transportation Rt 100, Rt 113 and the PA Turnpike.  Homes that are in this condition in the community do not last long on the market.  Schedule your showing now!

PublicRemarks: Estate home set on 4.4 picturesque acres offering 6 bedrooms and 3.5 bathroom main house, complemented by an extraordinary 1 bedroom 1.5 bath entertainment barn and a private studio apartment with full bath on the grounds. This rare property presents a unique opportunity to enjoy three beautifully designed living quarters on a single parcel — ideal for multi-generational living, guest accommodations, or flexible lifestyle needs. Nestled within the picturesque landscape of Chester Springs, 2 Fox Run Rd is a remarkable residence that seamlessly blends historic charm with refined luxury. Set on 4.4 breathtaking acres, this extraordinary 1767 farmhouse — tracing back to the original William Penn Land Grant — has been meticulously restored to preserve its rich heritage while offering modern comforts. From the moment you arrive, the home’s timeless stone façade and stately presence showcase exceptional craftsmanship and architectural beauty. Inside, historic character abounds, featuring exposed stone walls, original and custom hardwood flooring, curved walls, reclaimed wood beams, deep window sills, custom solid wood doors with original hardware, stunning built-ins, and beautifully remodeled closets providing ample storage. Four striking fireplaces grace the first floor alone, creating warmth and ambiance throughout the living spaces. This fully furnished residence offers 5 bedrooms and 3.5 baths. The gourmet kitchen serves as the heart of the home, thoughtfully designed with custom beams, cherry soft-close cabinetry, honed marble countertops, double ovens, gas cooktop, Sub-Zero refrigerator with custom wood panels, beverage and wine refrigerators, warming drawer, dishwasher, and two custom deep sinks. The kitchen flows effortlessly into a sun-drenched dining area, perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The main level features an elegant library, sunroom, keeping room, great room, bedroom or office, laundry room with pocket door, and a stylish half bath. The second floor offers a luxurious primary suite with en-suite bath, an additional bedroom and bath in the farmhouse, plus two more bedrooms and a full bath in the addition. The third floor provides flexible space ideal for a bedroom, studio, office, or playroom. The finished lower level adds over 500 square feet of living space, complete with a newly installed home theater featuring a 100-inch Sony TV, surround sound, and Restoration Hardware seating — perfect for movie nights or game days. A dedicated gym area and additional storage complete this level. Outdoor living is nothing short of spectacular. Patio doors off the kitchen and great room open to sweeping views of lush gardens, exquisite landscaping, and a custom waterfall with koi pond. The saltwater heated pool, outdoor shower, multiple patios, gazebo, and firepit areas are complemented by a beautifully designed pool house, creating a private resort-like retreat. The renovated entertainment barn is truly unforgettable. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated, from hardwood herringbone floors to the gourmet kitchen featuring Sub-Zero refrigeration and a Wolf 6-burner stove with griddle and pot filler. The dramatic two-story great room is bathed in natural light, showcasing stunning stone walls and a cozy fireplace. A charming coffee nook offers a perfect work-from-home or relaxation space. The barn’s second floor provides additional gathering or recreation space, while the lower-level primary suite serves as a luxurious private haven, complete with fireplace and spa-inspired bath. A covered brick patio extends the living experience outdoors. The barn also includes a 4-car garage and a studio apartment with a fully equipped kitchen and tile shower — ideal for guests or extended stays. All utilities are included in rent. Applicants must have a credit score of 690+ & monthly income of 3x the monthly rent.
